_purpose: Firefox unpacked-extension IDs for the ChatGPT host on the Firefox browser. Established in Phase 8G-6 (2026-05-19) as part of the first chatgpt+firefox proof-of-chain stub.
_format: variants.<variant>.gecko_id = the Firefox extension ID (string, email-style or UUID), injected verbatim into manifest.json's browser_specific_settings.gecko.id. variants.<variant>.strict_min_version = the minimum Firefox version supported (MV3 needs 109.0+).
_security: Firefox does NOT use a public-key derivation scheme like Chrome's manifest 'key'. The gecko_id is just a string the operator chooses; Firefox uses it verbatim as the extension ID for unpacked + Temporary Add-on loads. There is no private key associated with this ID; uniqueness is enforced by social convention (the domain suffix prevents collisions with other authors).
_warning: Do NOT change a gecko_id after operators have loaded the extension — Firefox's chrome.storage.local and other per-extension state is keyed by ID. As of Phase 8G-6 the chatgpt+firefox variants have NO external ID coupling (no Supabase Auth Redirect URL etc.) — only the local Firefox profile is affected if a regeneration happens.
